pages.title: A material pack
pages.text: TAIGA adds $(6)36 materials$() — new ores, ingots, alloys, and molten fluids — aimed squarely at $(item)Tinkers' Construct 3$()'s smeltery. Most of its value is in crafting better tools, though the storage blocks and decorative variants are yours to keep.

pages.title: Material structure
pages.text: Each material has up to four forms:$(br)$(item)Ingot$() — 144 mb in fluid form.$(br)$(item)Nugget$() — 16 mb, 9 per ingot.$(br)$(item)Dust$() — crafted or alloyed; melts identically to its ingot.$(br)$(item)Block$() — 1296 mb, 9 ingots.$(br2)Two materials also have a $(item)Crystal$() form: $(l:ores/end_ores)Tiberium$() and $(l:ores/overworld_ores)Dilithium$(), melting at 72 mb each.

pages.title: Two things to know
pages.text: 1. $(item)Uru$() is conspicuously absent from most TAIGA lists. SoA ships it natively under the $(o)soa_additions$() namespace — same recipes, different ID.$(br2)2. Alloy recipes $(italic)require$() the TC3 smeltery. A vanilla furnace or blast furnace won't compose them.
